delegates.use: Rejected the unsupported order-45 archive baseline and selected the exact novel-order-42 discriminator.
Required leakage-safe control selection, dual exact checking, and canonical novelty as the discovery gate.

principal_audit: Verified from the 1997 primary paper that I2/I3 are general identities and the displayed LP application proves R(4,6)<=41, not an order-45 R(5,5) baseline.
Verified from the authoritative ANU data page that r45extreme supplies only the smallest and largest few edge layers and that the 656 order-42 graphs are not advertised as complete.
Designed and executed the deterministic exact-boundary SAT benchmark rather than relying on delegate computation.
Accepted only full graph checks, canonical membership, independent NetworkX isomorphism, direct CNF evaluation, mutation controls, and byte-identical compressed replay.
